problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Combining Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
